**Description (short, ≤350 chars):**
Official Loom stack showcase — local-first durable chat agent with checkpoint/resume, multi-agent supervisor, MCP tools, offline traces. Built on loom-runner + flow-xray. https://kroq86.github.io/loom-stack/

**Website:**
https://kroq86.github.io/loom-stack/

**Topics (comma-separated for GitHub Topics field):**
agents, ai-agents, multi-agent, mcp, model-context-protocol, checkpoint, sqlite, local-first, loom, loom-runner, flow-xray, durable-execution, python, showcase, reference-implementation, langgraph-alternative, resumable-agents

**Social preview title:**
loom-run — official Loom stack showcase

**Social preview description:**
Runnable reference product for durable local AI agents: SQLite checkpoints, supervisor/subagent, MCP, mock LLM for CI, HTML traces. Not LangGraph — a demo of loom-runner.
